name: AI API Response Tester
description: Fetches data from a user-provided API URL, uses Claude AI to analyze the response structure, data quality, and potential issues, and posts a comprehensive API analysis report to Slack with Block Kit formatting. Adapted from n8n's interactive API fundamentals tutorial workflow.

source.originalName: Learn API Fundamentals with an Interactive Hands-On Tutorial Workflow

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting the analysis

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the API analysis

apiUrl.description: The API endpoint URL to test (e.g. https://api.example.com/v1/data)

httpMethod.description: HTTP method: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE (default: GET)

headers.description: Optional HTTP headers as JSON string (e.g. {"Authorization": "Bearer token"})

requestBody.description: Optional request body for POST/PUT requests (JSON string)

steps.name: Build Claude prompt for API analysis
Build Slack Block Kit API analysis report
